items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce (including Stored XSS via Server-Side Template Injection and Account Takeover)
items.summary: This update resolves critical and important vulnerabilities, including a stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability via server-side template injection (CVE-2025-47110) and a one-click account takeover issue.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Security Update (Multiple Vulnerabilities)
items.summary: This security update addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Codazon Magento Themes
items.summary: A reflected XSS vulnerability in Codazon Magento Themes v1.1.0.0 to v2.4.7 allows attackers to execute arbitrary Javascript in a user's browser via a crafted payload.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files using a polyglot technique, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source (Multiple Vulnerabilities)
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, and gain unauthorized access to store data.

items.title: Improper Access Control and Stored XSS in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This vulnerability affects Adobe Commerce versions 2.4.8-beta1 and earlier, allowing a low-privileged attacker to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized access, and also includes a stored XSS vulnerability.
